posts.body:
Short on time? Our Grab-n-Go options have your back!

Fresh, quick, and perfect for busy days, pick up and enjoy.

Stop in today and grab something on the go! ➡

Our Avocado Toast is a crowd favorite for a reason! 😉

Fresh, flavorful, and made to order, it’s the perfect pairing with your favorite smoothie or juice.

Charlotte, it’s your turn... come visit us today!

Your next go-to order starts here. 🍊✨

From smoothies and bowls to avocado toast, cold-pressed juices, and wellness shots, everything on our menu is crafted with real ingredients to help you feel your best.

Check out the full menu:

Charlotte, meet The Juice Pod! ✨

Started in the Philadelphia area by two sisters with a passion for fresh, feel-good ingredients, The Juice Pod has quickly become a community favorite. Now, we’re excited to expand and bring our love of wholesome, healthy eats to Charlotte.

From smoothies and bowls to light bites and juices, everything is made fresh and crafted to fuel your day.

Explore what we’re all about:

reviews_data.review_text: I came here on a whim didn’t eat all day looking for a meal like replacement like smoothie. I went with The Matchacado and wow it exceeded my expectations and was exactly what I was looking for. The ingredients for the price made sense to me. Also, friendly staff. I will be back! I do need to find out about parking validation though…
Don't go unless you want to wait an hour for your drink. They will also make your order wrong and give you the wrong so double check your order. terrible customer service.

5 employees working, dead slow, they stare at you from behind the 6 foot wall because you are expected to not bother them and order by QR code. Took 10 minutes for a smoothie. Pass on this place. Owner must be lazy
Waited for my smoothie for 30 minutes. Decided to request a refund as I didn’t feel like spending an hour of my day waiting for one.
Incredible place . Always great, personalble service — especially from Dom and Ley. They greet me with a big smile and joy that permeates throughout the whole room! Valuable employees!

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: Good Vibes Smoothie was very good and exactly as I expected. I ordered ahead and it was ready as soon as I arrived. Staff was friendly and quick with my order. Almost missed it from the outside but ultimately saw the window art; I think they’d benefit from a header sign
Went when there was no line and it was very quick! Best smoothie I’ve ever had the Rail Trail- don’t let the reviews scare you!
absolutely delicious and the people working were delightful!

I was really disappointed with the smoothies from The Juice Pod. They looked good at first, but the taste was a complete letdown. It honestly felt like I was just drinking watered-down fruit—there was barely any flavor at all. For something that’s supposed to be fresh and packed with ingredients, I expected a lot more. Definitely not worth the price, and I wouldn’t order a smoothie from here again.

I can’t speak to the service or atmosphere of this place because I placed an order through Uber Eats but one thing I do know is my smoothing was bad.  I got the strawberry glow smoothie for reference. It has a really strange almost sour flavor and don’t even get me started on the chunks. I question how long it was blended for. This thing was just awful to the point where I can’t even finish it. I’m so sad and hungry because this was my lunch for work. The avocado toast was fine.

Im obsessed with this place! I have visited multiple times since they opened. I have tried 4+ different smoothies and they have all been fantastic. My favorite is the nutter butter. My husband enjoyed their smoothie bowls as well. Customer service has always been good, especially the manager, she is always so kind! I had very quick service every time I visited, up until recently they have definitely started getting noticeably busier. The associates behind the counter were still kind and communicative about the longer wait times. My smoothie still came out delicious and consistent to what I expected. Hope everyone gives them grace as they work out the kinks as they grow this business!!! They are the best smoothies in charlotte!!

We’ve visited The Juice Pod twice now, and unfortunately both times we were turned away before closing time due to what they called a “capacity” issue from online orders. Yesterday they closed around 4:45 PM, and today they closed at 1:30 PM — despite their listed hours showing 6:00 PM. That’s nearly 4.5 hours early.

As a new business, consistency is everything. If you can’t fulfill walk-in customers during normal business hours, the online order volume needs to be managed better — or your listed hours need to reflect reality. There’s a competitor within walking distance, and after two failed visits, it’s hard to justify giving it a third try. I genuinely hope they figure out the operational side, because nobody wants to see a local spot fail — but this needs to change.

My husband and I were excited to try this place, but my smoothie tasted like it had commitment issues. Couldn’t decide if it wanted to be juice, ice, or just sadness in a cup. I kept waiting for flavor to show up… it never did. We asked to speak to the manager, but were told she wasn’t there. Honestly, that felt fitting  the flavor wasn’t there either. At this point, I think both took the day off together. For the price of these smoothies, I expected something worthy of Instagram. Instead, I got something worthy of a dramatic sigh and a very long sip of regret.

I walked in thinking I was about to get a refreshing smoothie, but instead I got what tasted like someone waved a strawberry near a cup of ice water and called it a day. For the price, I expected something closer to "tropical paradise," not "mystery slush from a science experiment."
I asked to speak to the manager because I genuinely thought something had gone wrong with my drink, but apparently the manager wasn't there. Either that or she has mastered the ancient art of disappearing when smoothies go bad.
Would I come back? Only if I suddenly develop a craving for expensive disappointment.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Dear Lindsay, we totally understand and apologize for the poor quality of the products you received. We were certainly hoping for the community to give us a try, and the outpouring has been both awesome and overwhelming!  I assure you that we are in the process of improving our delivery model and will look to shorten our wait times. We ask for everyone’s patience as we aim to deliver the best product in as short a time as possible. Hope you’ll give us another try, as we are just starting our journey!
reviews_data.review_text: Waited over an hour for a smoothie and wrap. The smoothie was terrible missing many of the ingredients and the wrap was soggy and not fresh at all. Wouldn’t recommend going unless they turn things around!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Anna,  we completely understand and apologize for the delay in receiving your order. We were certainly hoping for the community to give us a try, and the outpouring has been both awesome and overwhelming! I assure you that we are in the process of improving our delivery model and will look to shorten our wait times. We are also in the process of hiring more staff, as demand has been significant! We ask for everyone’s patience as we aim to deliver the best product in as short a time as possible. Hope you’ll give us another try, as we are just starting our journey and aim to solve any issues that arise as we grow our business in CLT!
reviews_data.review_text: This place is in shambles. It took an hour and 20 minutes to get my açaí bowl. They seemed really confused and never gave my friend her smoothie - I had to go up there and bother them about it (it took even longer than my bowl). The place is full of mad customers who had no idea that they signed up to spend their entire morning waiting for a smoothie. People kept going up to ask for refunds. They either need to hire more staff or restrict the number of people that can place orders. I am sure that they are very nice, but they seem very confused and completely overwhelmed. I think it was taking them 10 minutes to make each smoothie/bowl. What’s the point of a quick serve restaurant that takes longer than a sit down meal? Also, it tasted pretty average.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Megan, we are sorry for the long wait times you faced today. I assure you that we are in the process of improving our delivery model and will look to shorten our wait times. We are currently hiring more staff to handle the influx we get on busy weekend days! We ask for everyone’s patience as we aim to deliver the best product in as short a time as possible. Hope you’ll give us another try in the future, as we are just starting our journey.
reviews_data.review_text: Smoothies are always good, but not worth the 57 minute wait. Do not bother coming on a Saturday afternoon if you have any plans, this place is severely understaffed!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Daniel, we completely understand and are sorry to hear about your experience today. An hour wait and a smoothie that didn’t meet expectations is definitely not the standard we strive for. I assure you that we are in the process of improving our delivery model and will look to shorten our wait times and improve our product quality. We are currently hiring more staff to handle the influx we get on busy weekend days! We ask for everyone’s patience as we aim to deliver the best product in the shortest time possible. Hope you’ll give us another try in the future, as we are just starting our journey.
reviews_data.review_text: An hour wait for a $16 smoothie that tastes like dirt. Do better.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jeziel, we’re really sorry for your experience. A 45+ minute wait, lack of communication, and a smoothie that didn’t meet expectations isn't acceptable and isn't the standard we’re working toward. I assure you that we are in the process of improving our delivery model and will look to shorten our wait times and improve our product quality. We are currently hiring more staff to handle the influx we get during lunch hours and on busy weekend days! We ask for everyone’s patience as we aim to deliver the best product in the shortest time possible. Hope you’ll give us another try in the future, as we are just starting our journey and aim to solve any issues that arise as we grow our business in CLT!
reviews_data.review_text: Waited over 45+ minutes in store for one smoothie and it was sub par at best. Horrendous wait times, no communication from staff, and no excuse for being in business for a month now. Will never come back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Angel - Thanks for your feedback and very sorry that we missed you had ordered a second smoothy.  Our team is just getting started and certainly something we didn't realize.  I will also state that Lisa, our manager, is one of the sincerest people I have ever met with a very strong faith behind her.  Please give us another opportunity to get you a great smoothie and feel free to ask for Lisa when you do.  Thanks again.
reviews_data.review_text: I visited The Juice Pod for the first time and it’s safe to say I won’t be returning. I ordered at 1:06 with 1 person in front of me, I received 1 of 2 of my smoothies 15 minutes later, fine, I don’t expect a smoothie to be “quick”. I sat in front of the bar and was served nothing but stares and silence for the next 15 minutes. They proceeded to make several other smoothies before I finally stood up to ask about the other half of my order. Maybe it’s my fault for waiting so long to ask but the staff was literally staring at me sitting right there and never bothered to ask… The manager brought me my order and offered me a superficial apology. I finally left at 1:46. That. Is. Ridiculous. Smoothies aren’t even good, it’s laughable. Waste of $23 and 40 minutes of my life. (And I tipped)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Danika - thanks so much for your visit and hope to see you again!
reviews_data.review_text: Smoothie tasted phenomenal, customer service was great!
5 STAR SMOOTHIESSS!!!!!! loved the south end glo!!😍i’ll be back over and over!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Zeeondrea - Thanks so much for giving us a try and hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: First let me start by saying… they’ve only been open a full week and I keep coming back!! 😭 This time I tried the Original Bowl and it did NOT disappoint. I’m definitely trying the Nutter Bowl next because the smoothie has been my favorite  and the Almond Joy too! This is definitely about to be my go-to spot as it warms up for a nice cold healthy treat!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Brad - Thanks for stopping by and giving The JP a try.  Hope to see you soon and spread the word!
reviews_data.review_text: I was SO excited to hear that Juice Pod was opening in Charlotte, as I am from the North where Juice Pod originated. Their Acai bowls are my favorite, not melted, and a great amount for the price. The Queen City Beauty smoothie is so thick and such a yummy treat. I totally recommend this spot, and I will definitely be going back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Morgan!  Hope to see all the Northeastern students stop by!
reviews_data.review_text: Really enjoyed my two recent trips to the juice pod! As a nursing student at Northeastern, and local community member, having a go-to smoothie shop as good as this one has been a great addition. I really enjoyed my Queen City Beauty Smoothie and my Açaí bowl. I will definitely include this in my new rotation for lunch on the go!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Nevada!
reviews_data.review_text: Friendly staff and loved the selections

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Christin!
reviews_data.review_text: The south END GLO smoothie is AMAZING!!!

I stopped into The Juice Pod to check it out since it had just opened and is quite close to where I live. The area was very pleasant and clean, the service was quick, and the smoothie I got was great. I had the Chocolate Chunk smoothie. The consistency was perfect and the flavor was great, sweet but not too sweet. A nice quick stop-in all around!
The BEST Açaí bowl I’ve ever had 💗

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Samantha for trying The Juice Pod!
reviews_data.review_text: Loved trying the juice pod! Definitely recommend it for a refreshing smoothie!

I loved trying out the Juice Pod!! They have a huge selection of different smoothies, acai bowls, juices, avocado toasts, wraps, and more! My personal favorite that I tried was the strawberry glo, which was highly recommended, and it was amazing! Not too sweet, tasted great, and was presented so well! I was amazed by how friendly and efficient the team was, even though it was their first week open. I got to talk with the manager, Lisa, and she was so helpful and kind! I went back a second time after my Pilates workout next door at Jetset, and that one was even better! It was called Almond Joy and had added protein, which was the perfect pick-me-up! If you live in South End I definitely recommend stopping here on your next walk with friends, family, or your furry pals! (They keep a stocked treat jar just for them!)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks Olivia!
reviews_data.review_text:
I love Juice Pods – South End! They have smoothies for every flavor profile, and they’re always thick, creamy, and super smooth. The team is very accommodating — if something isn’t quite how you like it, they’ll happily fix it and even recommend something better based on your preferences.
Me and my friends all tried and loved it!
If you like more savory flavors, the Nutter Butter is so good. South End Glo is popular and on the sweeter side. Rail Trail is perfect if you love coconut, and Strawberry Glo is a great option if you prefer something less sweet.
The manager, Lisa, is amazing — so kind and welcoming. You can tell they really care about their customers. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Mary-Catherine - I appreciate you giving us a try and apologies for your initial experience.  Our team has taking real time feedback and has improved on several of our smoothies and how we prepare them.  Hopefully you can give us another opportunity and please let us know right away if something isn't right and we'll fix it!  Thanks again for the feedback and hope to see you again.
reviews_data.review_text: Was excited to try Juice Pod but was unfortunately severely let down. I tried it twice - the first smoothie was one of the worst I’ve ever gotten from a smoothie spot. The second time, I waited over 35 minutes and got the strawberry glo which was better but still very mid. It looked nothing like the picture they promoted.

If you like more savory flavors, the Nutter Butter is so good. South End Glo is popular and on the sweeter side. Rail Trail is perfect if you love coconut, and Strawberry Glo is a great option if you prefer something less sweet.
The manager, Lisa, is amazing — so kind and welcoming. You can tell they really care about their customers. Highly recommend!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Mary-Catherine - I appreciate you giving us a try and apologies for your initial experience.  Our team has taking real time feedback and has improved on several of our smoothies and how we prepare them.  Hopefully you can give us another opportunity and please let us know right away if something isn't right and we'll fix it!  Thanks again for the feedback and hope to see you again.
reviews_data.review_text: Was excited to try Juice Pod but was unfortunately severely let down. I tried it twice - the first smoothie was one of the worst I’ve ever gotten from a smoothie spot. The second time, I waited over 35 minutes and got the strawberry glo which was better but still very mid. It looked nothing like the picture they promoted.

Short on time? Our Grab-n-Go options have your back!

Fresh, quick, and perfect for busy days, pick up and enjoy.

Stop in today and grab something on the go! ➡

Our Avocado Toast is a crowd favorite for a reason! 😉

Fresh, flavorful, and made to order, it’s the perfect pairing with your favorite smoothie or juice.

Charlotte, it’s your turn... come visit us today!

Your next go-to order starts here. 🍊✨

From smoothies and bowls to avocado toast, cold-pressed juices, and wellness shots, everything on our menu is crafted with real ingredients to help you feel your best.

Check out the full menu:

Charlotte, meet The Juice Pod! ✨

Started in the Philadelphia area by two sisters with a passion for fresh, feel-good ingredients, The Juice Pod has quickly become a community favorite. Now, we’re excited to expand and bring our love of wholesome, healthy eats to Charlotte.

From smoothies and bowls to light bites and juices, everything is made fresh and crafted to fuel your day.
